errorMessagePasskeysDomainNotValid.description: Effective domain is not a valid domain.

errorMessagePasskeysOriginNotAllowed.description: Origin is empty or not allowed.

optionsAutoFillAndSendHelpText.description: Auto-Fill And Send option help text.
optionsAutoFillAndSendHelpText.message: If credentials are found for a page and the login-type is an HTTP Basic Auth request, KeePassXC-Browser tries to login automatically with the first given credentials. When multiple credentials are present, the extension popup can be used to choose the correct one. Even when this feature is enabled, it is still possible to enter HTTP Basic Auth login manually.

optionsAutoFillAndSendHelpTextSecond.description: HTTP Basic Auth image help text.
optionsAutoFillAndSendHelpTextSecond.message: Un diàleg d'autenticació Basic Auth té aquesta pinta:

optionsAutoFillRelevantCredentialHelpTex.description: Auto-Fill Relevant Credential option help text.
optionsAutoFillRelevantCredentialHelpTex.message: Automatically fill in the relevant credential if a second fill is needed.

optionsAutoFillSingleEntryHelpText.description: Auto-Fill Single Entry option help text.
optionsAutoFillSingleEntryHelpText.message: Let KeePassXC-Browser automatically fill in credentials if it receives only a single entry.

optionsAutoFillSingleEntryWarning.message: Warning! Using auto-fill is not safe. Use at your own risk. KeePassXC-Browser automatically tries to detect login fields. However, they may be detected incorrectly, possibly filling sensitive data to unsafe input fields.

optionsAutoFillSingleTotpHelpText.description: Auto-Fill Single TOTP field option help text.
optionsAutoFillSingleTotpHelpText.message: Let KeePassXC-Browser automatically fill in TOTP fields if it receives only a single entry.

optionsAutoRetrieveCredentialsHelpText.message: El KeePassXC-Browser carregarà immediatament les credencials quan s'activi una pestanya.

optionsAutoSubmitHelpText.message: Automatically submits selected credentials. This is disabled for single entry auto-fill.

optionsAutocompleteUsernamesHelpText.message: Mostra un desplegable que conté totes les credencials disponibles per a tots els camps d'usuari d'una pàgina.

optionsAutomaticReconnectHelpText.message: Reconnects automatically to KeePassXC when it is detected.

optionsAutomaticReconnectWarning.message: Warning! This feature is experimental. Use at your own risk.

optionsUseObserverHelpText.message: Useful with pages that use popups or dynamic dialogs. Disable the feature to reduce CPU load on slower machines. When disabled credentials can be only inserted using keyboard shortcuts, the context menu or the extension popup.

popupGettingStartedText.description: Popup information message about Getting Started Guide.
popupGettingStartedText.message: Que és la primera vegada que fas servir l'extensió? Hi ha una guia per si la necessites.

popupIframeDetected.description: Text shown when page can be added to Site Preferences with Allow Cross-Origin iframes option enabled.
popupIframeDetected.message: A Cross-Origin iframe was detected. Add the URL to Site Preferences with Allow Cross-Origin iframes option enabled?

popupLoginText.description: A popup message shown when one or multiple credentials are present.
popupLoginText.message: Tria la informació d'inici de sessió que vols que s'introdueixi en aquesta pàgina.

popupMultiplePasswordFields.description: A popup message shown when web page has multiple password fields.
popupMultiplePasswordFields.message: More than one password field found on this page. Right-click one of the password fields, and choose one of:

popupNeedReconfigure.description: A popup message shown when the extension has been disconnected from KeePassXC.
popupNeedReconfigure.message: S'ha desconnectat el KeePassXC-Browser del KeePassXC.

popupNeedReconfigureMessage.description: A popup message shown when reconnect is needed.
popupNeedReconfigureMessage.message: Clica el botó de reconnectar per establir una nova connexió.

popupNotConfigured.description: A popup message shown when the extension has not been connected to KeePassXC.
popupNotConfigured.message: Encara no has configurat el KeePassXC-Browser. Clica al botó de connectar per emparellar-lo amb el KeePassXC.

popupRedetectButton.description: Popup Redetect login fields button text.
popupRedetectButton.message: Redetecta els camps d'inici de sessió

popupReopenButton.message: Torna a obrir la base de dades

popupTroubleshootingText.description: Popup information message about Troubleshooting Guide.
popupTroubleshootingText.message: Que no se' connecta al KeePassXC? Pots consultar la pàgina de la nostra wiki.

popupUpdateAvailable.description: Popup warning message about old version of KeePassXC.
popupUpdateAvailable.message: Estàs fent servir una versió antiquada el KeePassXC.

popupUsername.description: A username field name shown on credential update.

popupUsernameButton.description: Button text for adding Username-only option.
popupUsernameButton.message: Afegeix l'opció de "només nom d'usuari" per aquest lloc

popupUsernameFieldDetected.description: Text shown when page can be added to Site Preferences with Username-only option enabled.
popupUsernameFieldDetected.message: S'ha detectat un camp de nom d'usuari sol. Vols afegir aquesta URL a les configuracions de lloc amb l'opció de "només nom d'usuari"?

reconnectButtonTitle.message: Reconnecta la base de dades activa al KeePassXC-Browser.

redetectButtonTitle.description: Redetect login fields button title text.
redetectButtonTitle.message: Redetecta tots els camps d'entrada de la pàgina.

reloadButtonTitle.message: Recarrega l'extensió i reconnecta al KeePassXC.

rememberChooseCredentials.description: A message shown choosing what credentials user wants to update.
rememberChooseCredentials.message: Tria les credencials que vols actualitzar.

rememberChooseGroup.description: A message shown choosing what group user wants to use for new credentials.
rememberChooseGroup.message: Tria un grup per desar les noves credencials.

rememberCredentialsExists.description: Message shown when new credentials already found in database.
rememberCredentialsExists.message: No cal actualitzar res, ja hi ha unes credencials idèntiques desades.

rememberCredentialsNotSaved.description: Message shown when saving operation was cancelled.
rememberCredentialsNotSaved.message: S'ha canceŀlat l'operació. No s'han actualitzat les credencials.

rememberCredentialsSaved.description: Message shown when new credentials are saved.
rememberCredentialsSaved.message: S'han desat les noves credencials amb el nom d'usuari $1.

rememberCredentialsUpdated.description: Message shown when new credentials are successfully updated.
rememberCredentialsUpdated.message: S'han actualitzat les credencials amb el nom d'usuari $1.

rememberErrorCannotSaveCredentials.description: Error message shown when credentials cannot be saved or updated.
rememberErrorCannotSaveCredentials.message: No s'han pogut desar o actualitzar les credencials.

rememberErrorCreatingNewGroup.description: Error message shown when new groups cannot be created.
rememberErrorCreatingNewGroup.message: No es  poden crear nous  grups.

rememberErrorDatabaseClosed.description: Error message shown when credentials cannot be saved or updated and the database is closed.
rememberErrorDatabaseClosed.message: No es poden desar o actualitzar les credencials amb la base de dades tancada.

rememberErrorPasswordNotChanged.description: Error message shown when credential password is not changed.
rememberErrorPasswordNotChanged.message: No s'han actualitzat  les credencials. La contrasenya no s'ha canviat.

rememberInfoDefaultGroupNotFound.description: Info message shown when default group set cannot be found.
rememberInfoDefaultGroupNotFound.message: S'ha creat el grup per defecte a la base de dades connectada.

rememberInfoText.description: Message when username or password has changed.
rememberInfoText.message: Ha canviat el nom o la contrasenya! Vols desar la nova combinació?

rememberNewUsername.description: A message shown when a new username is detected when saving credentials.
rememberNewUsername.message: El nom d'usuari "$1" no està desat encara.

rememberNoPassword.description: Message shown when no password is set when saving credentials.
rememberNoPassword.message: Omple el camp de contrasenya abans de desar les credencials.

rememberNothingChanged.description: Message shown when trying to save credentials that haven't changed.
rememberNothingChanged.message: No s'han pogut detectar els canvis a les credencials.

rememberSaving.description: A message when saving or updating credentials.
rememberSaving.message: Es desaran les credencials la base de dades connectada amb l'identificador $1

rememberUsernameExists.description: A message shown when an existing username is detected when saving credentials.
rememberUsernameExists.message: The credentials with the used username are marked bold: $1

removeConnectedDatabaseButtonTitle.description: Remove button title on Connected Databases tab.
removeConnectedDatabaseButtonTitle.message: Esborra del KeePassXC-Browser la connexió a la base de dades.

removeCustomLoginFieldsButtonTitle.description: Remove button title on Custom Login Fields tab.
removeCustomLoginFieldsButtonTitle.message: Esborra els camps d'autenticació personalitzats d'aquesta URL.

removeSitePreferencesButtonTitle.description: Remove button title on Site Preferences tab.
removeSitePreferencesButtonTitle.message: Esborra la configuració de lloc per aquesta URL.

reopenDatabaseButtonTitle.message: Reobre la base de dades activa.

stringFields.description: General text for a String Fields.

totpFieldText.message: Omple el codi TOTP amb el KeePassXC

usernameButtonTitle.description: Add Username-only detection button title text.
usernameButtonTitle.message: Afegeix a la pàgina actual la detecció només a partir del nom d'usuari.

usernameDisconnectedFieldText.description: Username field icon hover text when KeePassXC is disconnected.

usernameFieldTextNoCredentials.description: Username field icon hover text when no credentials are.
usernameFieldTextNoCredentials.message: No s'han trobat credencials per omplir.

usernameLockedFieldText.description: Username field icon hover text when database is locked.
usernameLockedFieldText.message: La base de dades està bloquejada.

welcomeText.description: Main title of Getting Started page.
